rules.summary: Unless otherwise stated, this Part applies to:

sections.chapter_title: Requirement to Hold Eligible Own Funds Covering the SCR

rules.summary: A firm must hold eligible own funds covering its SCR.

sections.chapter_title: General Provisions for the Calculation of the SCR

rules.summary: A firm must calculate its SCR either in accordance with the standard formula or using an internal model for which __internal model permission has been granted.
A firm must calculate its SCR on the presumption that it will pursue its business as a going concern.
A firm’s SCR :
A firm’s SCR must correspond to the value-at-risk of its basic own funds subject to a confidence level of 99.5% over a one-year period.
When calculating the SCR , firms must take account of the effect of risk-mitigation techniques , provided that credit risk and other risks arising from the use of risk-mitigation techniques
Notwithstanding 3.2 to [3.5](/pra-rules/solvency-capital-requirement---general-provisions#c920567

sections.chapter_title: Frequency of Calculation of the SCR

rules.summary: A firm must calculate its SCR and report the result of that calculation to the PRA at least once a year.
For the purposes of 2.1, a firm must hold eligible own funds which cover its last reported _S
A firm must monitor the amount of its eligible own funds and its SCR on an ongoing basis.
If a firm’s risk profile deviates significantly from the assumptions underlying its last reported SCR , the firm must recalculate its SCR without delay and report it to the PRA.
Where there is evidence to suggest that the risk profile of a firm has altered significantly since the date on which the SCR was last reported by it, if so requested by the PRA , the firm must
A firm must make every effort to remedy the deficiencies that led to the imposition of a capital add-on arising as a result of an internal model significant risk profile deviation or a _signific

A firm must be able to, upon request by the PRA, submit a progress report to the PRA setting out the measures taken, and the progress made, to remedy the deficiencies that led to the imposition of a c
Except as provided in 5.3, the SCR prior to the imposition of the capital add-on , together w
For the purposes of calculating the risk margin , the SCR of a firm must not include any capital add-on imposed as a result of a significant system of governance deviation.

sections.chapter_title: Requirement to Hold Eligible Own Funds: Lloyd’s

rules.summary: This Chapter applies to the Society.
The Society must ensure that eligible own funds are held at Lloyd’s covering its SCR.
Eligible own funds covering the central requirement must be eligible own funds attributable to the Society.
Where the standard formula is used by the Society to calculate the SCR for Lloyd’s, the Society must carry out the following process before it will be taken to have demonstrated that [6.2](/pr
Where the Society uses an  internal model for which internal model permission has been granted,  _the Society must also ensure that eligible own funds_ are held at Lloyd’s covering, for at lea
Where an  internal model for which internal model permission has been granted is used by the Society to calculate the SCR , for the purpose of meeting the requirement set out in [6.2](/pra-rules

sections.chapter_title: General Provisions for Calculation of the SCR: Lloyd’s

rules.summary: This Chapter applies to the Society.
In calculating the SCR for Lloyd’s, the Society must ensure that the SCR is calibrated so as to include:
The Society must calculate a central requirement for Lloyd’s which meets 7.2(2).
The central requirement must take account of the risk that the central assets may be used to meet deficiencies (as to amount or quality) in own funds attributable to members , such own funds

sections.chapter_title: Syndicate Notional SCR and Member Notional SCR: Lloyd’s

rules.summary: This Chapter applies to managing agents and, where specified, the Society.
A managing agent must calculate a notional SCR for each syndicate which it manages.
The notional SCR for each syndicate referred to in 8.2 must be calculated using a methodology
The Society must calculate a notional SCR for each member using the method of calculation chosen to calculate the SCR for Lloyd’s for the purpose of [3.1](/pra-rules/solvency-capital-requireme
